cards.name: 9 of Wands
cards.interpretation: last stand, persistence, grit, resilience, perseverance, close to success, fatigue

cards.name: 9 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: being guarded, living beyond means, material instability, reckless spending, superficiality

cards.name: ⅩⅧ The Moon
cards.interpretation: illusion, intuition, uncertainty, confusion, complexity, secrets, unconscious
